text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: Mark Twain

text: It is not that we have a short time to live, but that we waste a good deal of it.
author: Seneca

text: You do not rise to the level of your goals. You fall to the level of your systems.
author: James Clear

text: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
author: Chinese Proverb

text: We suffer more often in imagination than in reality.
author: Seneca

text: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
author: Lao Tzu

text: How long are you going to wait before you demand the best for yourself?
author: Epictetus

text: Focus on being productive instead of busy.
author: Tim Ferriss

text: The obstacle is the way.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: What we fear doing most is usually what we most need to do.
author: Tim Ferriss

text: He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

text: Waste no more time arguing about what a good man should be. Be one.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
author: Steve Jobs

text: If you are depressed you are living in the past. If you are anxious you are living in the future. If you are at peace you are living in the present.
author: Lao Tzu

text: Begin at once to live, and count each separate day as a separate life.
author: Seneca

text: Small daily improvements over time lead to stunning results.
author: Robin Sharma

text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
author: Buddha

text: Discipline equals freedom.
author: Jocko Willink

text: No man is free who is not master of himself.
author: Epictetus

text: Done is better than perfect.
author: Sheryl Sandberg

text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
author: Aristotle

text: The happiness of your life depends upon the quality of your thoughts.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: Action is the foundational key to all success.
author: Pablo Picasso

text: Be tolerant with others and strict with yourself.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: The wise man does at once what the fool does finally.
author: Niccolo Machiavelli

text: Your time is limited, so don't waste it living someone else's life.
author: Steve Jobs

text: First say to yourself what you would be; and then do what you have to do.
author: Epictetus

text: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
author: Leonardo da Vinci

text: What stands in the way becomes the way.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: Until we can manage time, we can manage nothing else.
author: Peter Drucker

text: If you want to lift yourself up, lift up someone else.
author: Booker T. Washington

text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
author: Confucius

text: The key is not to prioritize what's on your schedule, but to schedule your priorities.
author: Stephen Covey

text: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.
author: Seneca

text: Well-being is realized by small steps, but is truly no small thing.
author: Zeno of Citium

text: You are what you repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
author: Will Durant

text: The present moment is filled with joy and happiness. If you are attentive, you will see it.
author: Thich Nhat Hanh

text: An unexamined life is not worth living.
author: Socrates

text: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence is not an act, but a habit.
author: Aristotle

text: Very little is needed to make a happy life; it is all within yourself, in your way of thinking.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: The only person you are destined to become is the person you decide to be.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

text: When you arise in the morning, think of what a precious privilege it is to be alive.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: Energy and persistence conquer all things.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: To be yourself in a world that is constantly trying to make you something else is the greatest accomplishment.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

text: Perfection is not attainable, but if we chase perfection we can catch excellence.
author: Vince Lombardi

text: Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
author: Buddha

text: Choose not to be harmed and you won't feel harmed. Don't feel harmed and you haven't been.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
author: Winston Churchill

text: The more I accomplish, the more I realize that time is the most valuable commodity.
author: Elon Musk

text: Nothing endures but change.
author: Heraclitus

text: The whole future lies in uncertainty: live immediately.
author: Seneca

text: Be kind, for everyone you meet is fighting a hard battle.
author: Plato

text: What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become by achieving your goals.
author: Zig Ziglar

text: True happiness is to enjoy the present, without anxious dependence upon the future.
author: Seneca

text: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Dwell on the beauty of life. Watch the stars, and see yourself running with them.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: One day or day one. You decide.
author: Paulo Coelho

text: Wherever you are, be all there.
author: Jim Elliot

text: The soul becomes dyed with the color of its thoughts.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: Fall seven times, stand up eight.
author: Japanese Proverb
